business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate property owner/operator with office, mercantile, and mixed-use locations

coverages_discussed.notes: Current values based on prior year SOV TIV total; requested values based on current Locations sheet total TIV including BI values.

positives: Portfolio consists primarily of fire resistive and masonry non-combustible construction.
Properties are relatively modern, with years built ranging from 1995 to 2018.
Occupancies are primarily office and mercantile.
concerns: Portfolio values increased materially from prior year.

Modifications sheet indicates a deletion of an old location effective 2026-03-15, but no corresponding location details are provided.
